text: @ Add Folder (default) #+General <&Sharing EAFile Versioning Y Ignore Patterns 42 Advanced Folder Label Main Optional descriptive label for the folder. Can be different on each device Folder ID default Required identifier for the folder. Must be the same on all cluster devices. When adding a new folder, keep in mind that the Folder ID is used o tie folders together between devices. They are case sensitive and must match exactly between all devices. Folder Path ~/Sync Path to the folder on the local computer. Will be created if it does not exist. The tilde character (~) can be used as a shortcut for /home/yoshixi xcioe
